summary.intent: Add Gemini CLI as an agent option in the entire-fzf zsh plugin's agent selector at line 138.
summary.outcome: Gemini CLI was added to the `_entire_open_agent` case statement in entire-fzf.plugin.zsh, committed, and pushed.

repo: Agent names are defined only within a single case statement in _entire_open_agent — there is no separate list or array to maintain.

code.finding: Agent selector case statement — new agents must be added here with their CLI command and flags

workflow: User prefers short commit+push commands ('commit push') rather than separate steps.

friction: Initial entry used 'Gemini' instead of 'Gemini CLI', requiring a correction edit before committing.
The --resume flag for Gemini CLI was not verified against actual Gemini CLI documentation.
open_items: Verify that the Gemini CLI --resume flag (and any other flags used) is correct for the actual gemini CLI interface.
